name: IR/Raman Phase Finder
summary: Fix loading and saving filled reference templates with qualitative intensity labels.
Persist user reference card edits back to .vsref files and the SQL line cache.
Add project save/load support for spectra, sample cards and edited peak tables.
Simplify database maintenance with one SQL index update action and clearer button colors.
Draw matched reference lines at experimental peak positions with split ticks showing residual shift.
Add clearing and per-row removal actions for the selected compound list.
Render experimental reference cards as peak lines without vibrational mode labels.
Keep reference profile and peak-line display modes independent for cards.
Expose reference profile/peak-line mode switching from the plot right-click menu.
Restore database peak lines and labels for selected reference overlays.
Keep reference display mode changes from hiding both profile and peak-line layers.
Use the existing right-click layer items for reference profile and peak-line visibility.
Separate reference profile, reference peak-line and bottom tick visibility.
Add right-click toggles for reference mode labels and vibration assignment labels.
Show reference mode and vibration assignment labels for previewed user references when metadata is available.
